title: In the Name of Godfather
original_title: ชื่อชอบ ชวนหาเรื่อง
overview: A young man named Chob, is caught in bed with In-tu-orn, the daughter of a powerful and wealthy landowner who owns almost ever acre in northern Thailand by her father.
